_comment: Branch protection for UMBRELLA tier per REPO_STANDARDS.md §2. Tier repo: aidoc-flow (multi-repo umbrella). NO required status checks (submodule-pointer PRs have no code CI to run). Signed commits REQUIRED — AI commits are unsigned so all AI merges MUST use `gh pr merge --admin` (OPS-0062 governance layer). CODEOWNERS review required. `enforce_admins: false` because --admin merge IS the intentional bypass path.
_apply_note: PR-C2 MUST strip ALL `_`-prefix keys before POST/PUT/PATCH. Use `jq 'del(.._comment, .._apply_note, .._docs, .._endpoint, .._umbrella_note)'` or equivalent. GitHub REST endpoints strictly validate unknown fields.

required_pull_request_reviews._note: GitHub empirical quirk: with `required_approving_review_count=0`, CODEOWNERS enforcement may not bind (no approving-review slot to attach). Canon §2 umbrella row spec (0 + CODEOWNERS ✅) intentionally accepts this — human merges use --admin per OPS-0062 and the CODEOWNERS block is signal rather than a hard gate. Track v2 for either raising the count or verifying enforcement on a throwaway branch.
